verses.text: Nebuchadnezzar besieges Jerusalem, and 'the Lord gave' Jehoiakim into his hand, with the temple vessels carried to Babylon. God's hand behind it. Even Judah's defeat was the Lord's doing, not Babylon's might alone.

Nebuchadnezzar besieges Jerusalem, and 'the Lord gave' Jehoiakim into his hand, with the temple vessels carried to Babylon. God's hand behind it. Even Judah's defeat was the Lord's doing, not Babylon's might alone.
The king picks gifted youths of royal seed to be schooled in Chaldean learning and fed from his table. A gilded snare. The world's favours can be a subtler danger than its threats.
The king picks gifted youths of royal seed to be schooled in Chaldean learning and fed from his table. A gilded snare. The world's favours can be a subtler danger than its threats.
The king picks gifted youths of royal seed to be schooled in Chaldean learning and fed from his table. A gilded snare. The world's favours can be a subtler danger than its threats.
Among them are Daniel and his three friends, given new Babylonian names. Pressure to conform. They could change his name, but not his heart's allegiance to God.
Among them are Daniel and his three friends, given new Babylonian names. Pressure to conform. They could change his name, but not his heart's allegiance to God.
Daniel 'purposed in his heart' not to defile himself with the king's meat, and gently asked to be excused. Settled resolve. True faithfulness begins with a heart fixed before the test comes.
Daniel 'purposed in his heart' not to defile himself with the king's meat, and gently asked to be excused. Settled resolve. True faithfulness begins with a heart fixed before the test comes.
Daniel 'purposed in his heart' not to defile himself with the king's meat, and gently asked to be excused. Settled resolve. True faithfulness begins with a heart fixed before the test comes.
He proposes a ten-day trial of pulse and water; the steward, won by his courtesy, agrees to prove them. Wise gentleness. Daniel pursues conviction without needless offence.
He proposes a ten-day trial of pulse and water; the steward, won by his courtesy, agrees to prove them. Wise gentleness. Daniel pursues conviction without needless offence.
He proposes a ten-day trial of pulse and water; the steward, won by his courtesy, agrees to prove them. Wise gentleness. Daniel pursues conviction without needless offence.
He proposes a ten-day trial of pulse and water; the steward, won by his courtesy, agrees to prove them. Wise gentleness. Daniel pursues conviction without needless offence.
After ten days their faces are fairer and fuller than all who ate the royal food, so their diet is allowed. God honoured. He blesses those who honour Him, even in small obediences.
After ten days their faces are fairer and fuller than all who ate the royal food, so their diet is allowed. God honoured. He blesses those who honour Him, even in small obediences.

God gives the four knowledge and skill, and Daniel understanding in visions; the king finds them 'ten times better' than his magicians. Grace excels. What God's servants gain by faith outshines all worldly wisdom.
